extraction_reasoning:
The litigation analysis counts cases "Against" the Company, Subsidiaries, Promoters, Directors, KMP, and Senior Management. Specifically, there are 0 criminal cases, 0 regulatory enforcement actions, and 8 tax proceedings against the Company and its subsidiaries (3 against the Company and 5 against Subsidiaries). The total quantified litigation amount against the Company and Subsidiaries is 
₹833.89 million (
₹805.34 million for the Company and 
₹28.55 million for Subsidiaries, both from tax matters). The contingent liabilities are taken from the "Total" row of the contingent liabilities table as of September 30, 2025, amounting to 
₹934.32 million. Customer concentration figures are company-wide, for the Financial Year 2025, as a percentage of revenue from operations. All monetary figures are originally stated in "
₹ in million" and are converted to "crore" by dividing by 10.
